name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W214/S214 plug-in hybrid (3.0L 6-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M256 inline-six PHEV: ASSYST typically 15,000 km or 12 months when combustion mileage accumulates; shorter oil changes if often driven hard.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Cabin dust filter per Mercedes maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Turbo six air filter per ASSYST inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Regen extends pad life; inspections remain mandatory.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Six-cylinder PHEV: 60,000 km / 48 months orientation—verify ASSYST.
serviceNotes.coolant: Engine cooling circuit per Mercedes long-life interval.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: HV battery/e-drive coolant per supplement; ~120,000 km planning—qualified workshop only.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 4MATIC hybrid trans: preventive ATF ~60,000 km specialist recommendation.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary engine coolant ~120,000 km if not yet due.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo six: consider ~120,000 km if carbon-related symptoms.
